name: OKH Global Ltd.
summary: OKH Global Ltd., an investment holding company, engages in the integrated property development activities primarily focusing on logistics and industrial properties in Singapore. It operates through Construction Contractor, Property Development, and Property Investment segments. The Construction Contractor segment provides general builder and construction contractor, as well as general engineering services; and sells construction materials. The Property Development segment develops industrial properties. The Property Investment segment leases investment properties. OKH Global Ltd. was founded in 1998 and is headquartered in Singapore.
